title: Cinebase
summary: A streaming film and television catalog exercising Apollo cache isolation, SSR, hydration, and resilient navigation.

journeys.title: Filter the catalog and open a title with keyboard navigation
Keep the latest Apollo result when searches resolve out of order
Render empty and offline states and retry a failed GraphQL request
Add, reload, and remove a title from a device watchlist
Stream real server content and adopt input without losing user state

faultScenarios.description: The fixture transport lets both superseded searches complete; the moon query resolves after the harbor query so the visible Apollo result must remain isolated to the latest variables.
The outage query returns a deterministic GraphQL error until the user retries it.
An opt-in delay allows a user edit to server HTML before Octane adopts the input.
